context: User needs a tool that runs an external process with proper cancellation support.

checklist.name: Accepts abort signal from context
checklist.description: Destructures `abort` from the context parameter in execute

checklist.name: Checks abort.aborted or passes signal
checklist.description: Either checks `abort.aborted` early or passes `{ signal: abort }` to the shell command

checklist.name: Execute returns string
checklist.description: Returns a string (`.text()` or equivalent), not an object

checklist.name: Correct import and tool structure
checklist.description: Uses `tool` from `@opencode-ai/plugin` with proper description and args
